title: FURNITURE BANK - 211info
text: SALEM ALLIANCE CHURCH FURNITURE BANK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides gently-used furniture, mattresses, and household goods to people who have received permanent housing and need assistance transitioning from their shelter into a home. 555 Gaines Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 581-2129 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 581-2129 Message Phone (503) 616-3772 Text or call Furniture Bank Coordinator Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Complete online furniture request form or call for information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Cities of Keizer and Salem SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Services: Furniture Mattresses Small Kitchen Appliances Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - EMPLOYMENT NETWORK MONEY MANAGEMENT - FINANCIAL PEACE UNIVERSITY MUTUAL SUPPORT - GRIEF SUPPORT GROUP UTILITIES - THE ROYAL ORDER OF RED SUSPENDERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALEM ALLIANCE CHURCH
